case_title: RALPH HOLMES VS. ALLIED UNIVERSAL SECURITY SERVICES, LLC, A

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY ELECTRONIC MAIL OF MOTION; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 76454081) FILED BY OTHER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-30-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO JUNE-30-2025 HEARING RE: OTHER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED. ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: JOHN M. TRUE; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/JMT)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES, RALPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLIED UNIVERSAL SECURITY SERVICES, LLC, A PENNSYLVANIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $6,829.37 PRINCIPAL, $18.66 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,073.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT **VACATED PER ORDER FILED ON JUNE 30, 2025**
NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76426037) FILED BY OTHER STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER HEARING SET FOR JUN-30-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 301
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE CLERKS JUDGMENT.
